name_en: In Stock: Chane🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
name_cn:
In Stock: Chane🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
To be honest ❤️This is a vintage backpack that can be passed down for generations!Classic double C logo, quilted pattern paired with gold metal, leather chain strap, full of texture. The lambskin is soft and delicate, you can't help but want to own and cherish it!It can be used in all four seasons and suits any style💃It must be in your handbag collection
Small: Dimensions 17× 7× 15cm
Number: A2211
